description: Style NoteCarry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil.Product DetailsBlack leather walletHas eight card slots, two insert pockets and one main compartment with an internal slotOne separate id card holder which has two card slots and two id card holdersHas one insert pocket on the frontBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
